[[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Navy trooper]] '''Vesden''' was a counterintelligence agent assigned by the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. He operated sensors designed to protect the [[Endor shield generator bunker|control bunker]] from infiltration. When the [[Endor strike team/Legends|Endor strike team]] led by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] broke into the shield generator bunker moments prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Hewex/Legends|Hewex]] and his men were temporarily taken captive, including [[Fenson]] and Vesden. Eventually, reinforcements arrived and Hewex and his men were out of captivity. During the end of the forest battle, Vesden was taken captive by the Rebellion prior to the bunker's destruction.<ref name="ROTJ" /><ref name="Customizable Card Game" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vesden first appeared as an unnamed extra in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], portrayed by an uncredited actor.
